notes: SHIP v1.14.292 - Ship 4 design-call #2: ONE EMITTER PER SCREEN on Command (owner-ruled). The Command Lens / Active Shift hero (.lens) is the SOLE lit card; every decorative peer goes idle-dark. CSS-only, scoped body.rd #pg-cmd, no JS/data. Changes: (1) SPLIT the shared 'body.rd #pg-cmd .lens, .stat' rule so .lens keeps its cyan ring+inset glow VERBATIM and .stat gets its own idle-dark rule (neutral slate ring rgba(90,112,138,.28), cyan inset glow removed) - the stat NUMBER color (.block .n red / .dep .n cyan / .racks .n teal) stays the signal, not the card housing. (2) NBA 'LOAD MASTER / Next Best Action' (body.rd #pg-cmd .nba): dropped the inset violet 20% BLOOM; kept the violet 45% border-box ring so violet identity survives (secondary-channel, quiet). (3) idle shift tiles (body.rd #pg-cmd .tile:not(.hot):not(.hot-teal):not(.hot-gold)): new scoped override -> neutral slate ring + colored inset/outer --tc bloom stripped; the base body.rd .tile hot path is UNTOUCHED so .hot/.hot-teal/.hot-gold still emit their channel glow (live-state signal, honest). (4) status pills (body.rd #pg-cmd .spill): cyan inset housing-glow removed + ring -> neutral slate; the .dot keeps its state emission (mint OK / gold bad). (5) Ask tile (body.rd #pg-cmd .apill override added): housing de-bloomed to match .nba - kept the violet 45% ring identity (base rule), removed the unconditional inset violet bloom. Caught by an adversarial one-emitter sweep: .apill was the only non-hero card still blooming unconditionally (base rule, no body.rd override existed). Card HOUSING only - the .av icon violet drop-shadow halo (L9172, icon art, not a box-shadow) and the ASK->SCAN-ID structure/reserved slots are deferred to Ship-4 call #3 / owner decisions. Result: Command reads as one lit hero over dark data panels; glow now means live state (hot tile) or identity (hero), never decoration. OUT-OF-FENCE untouched: .stat.block .n red text, #ff3b3b SYS header glow, off-page mag. Three-stamp .291->.292; braces 11745->11748 balanced; CRLF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): hero .lens is the only glowing card on Command; NBA + Ask tile show a violet edge but no inner bloom; 3 stat KPI cards + idle shift tiles read as flat dark panels with colored numbers/labels; status pills flat with lit dots; a HOT shift tile (deploy activity) still glows its channel color. OPEN FLAG for #3: the Ask icon still carries a violet halo (icon art) - decide with John whether that stays when the housing goes dark. Remaining Ship-4 calls: #3 askrow SCAN-ID tile (+ retire ASK tile / reserved guard / icon-halo call), #4 hero mag strip (blockers>0) + BLOCKER verb accent.
